name: @ever-works/google-analytics-metrics-plugin
description: Google Analytics Metrics Plugin - Read-only GA4 metrics (active users, sessions, conversions/key events) for Ever Works Goals

plugin.name: Google Analytics Metrics
plugin.description: Read-only Google Analytics 4 metrics — active users, sessions and conversions (key events) per day/week/month — for evaluating Goals like "1000 active users/week".

envVars.name: GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_PROPERTY_ID
envVars.description: Numeric GA4 property id (can also be set via admin/user settings)

envVars.name: GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON
envVars.description: Full JSON service-account key with Viewer access to the GA4 property (can also be set via admin/user settings)
